title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TNT India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TNT India
jsonLd.description:
Join the TNT India family as a Fleet Manager in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
